description: Confidence-flag thresholds for F3 (trigger-action distance) and F8 (enforceability) LLM scoring. Tunable by eval harness.

F3.description: Flag rules where trigger-action distance sits in the level-transition zone (level 1/2 or 2/3 boundary) — LLM judgment resolves the ambiguity

F7.description: Flag rules where concrete:abstract ratio is mixed or counterexample test may be warranted

F8.description: Flag rules where enforceability sits in the level-transition zone (level 1/2 or 2/3 boundary) — LLM judgment resolves the ambiguity
